raw:
{
  "judge_id": "J123",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.3": 5,
    "R1.7": 5,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "The agent thoroughly audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure, identifying multiple issues with the original text.",
    "R1.7": "The agent demonstrates excellent citation-level engagement, flagging missing key works and providing precise bibliographic information.",
    "RX.1": "The agent clearly marks confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation, demonstrating a nuanced understanding of uncertainty.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed-upon active set J*(d), with no scope drift or deviations.",
    "RX.4": "The agent identifies harmful patterns in the original text and avoids introducing new errors or fabrications.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, demonstrating exceptional provenance and traceability."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.3": 0.9,
    "R1.7": 0.95,
    "RX.1": 0.85,
    "RX.3": 0.98,
    "RX.4": 0.92,
    "RX.5": 0.99
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The agent thoroughly audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure, identifying multiple issues with the original text.
rationale.R1.7: The agent demonstrates excellent citation-level engagement, flagging missing key works and providing precise bibliographic information.
rationale.RX.1: The agent clearly marks confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation, demonstrating a nuanced understanding of uncertainty.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed-upon active set J*(d), with no scope drift or deviations.
rationale.RX.4: The agent identifies harmful patterns in the original text and avoids introducing new errors or fabrications.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, demonstrating exceptional provenance and traceability.
